title: LoginResponse
description: Successful login response containing the session ID and server URL for subsequent API calls.

name.description: The username used to log in.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

title.description: The job title of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user.

emails.description: The email address of the user.

timezone.description: The time zone of the user (e.g., America/Los_Angeles).

serverUrl.description: The base URL to use in version 2 REST API calls. Use this URL as the base for all subsequent v2 API requests.

icSessionId.description: The REST API session ID. Include this value in the icSessionId header for all subsequent requests. Expires after 30 minutes of inactivity.

securityQuestion.description: The security question for the user account.

securityAnswer.description: The security answer (returned as empty string).

createTime.description: The time the user account was created.

updateTime.description: The time the user account was last updated.
